description: You are a broadcast engineer at a regional television station preparing content for air. Remediate the four media files in /home/ga/Videos/qc_flagged/ that failed quality control using the details in /home/ga/Documents/qc_flags.txt to meet broadcast specifications: 1920x1080, 25fps PAL, H.264/AVC in MP4, stereo AAC at 48kHz, and minimum 4Mbps video bitrate. Save the compliant files to /home/ga/Videos/broadcast_ready/ using original filenames with .mp4 extensions and generate a compliance audit report at /home/ga/Documents/compliance_report.json documenting the original violations, remediations, and final status for each file.
